productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Snova Glide Blue Sports Shoes
description: RIGID BUILD FOR CLASSIC RUNSThough for a cushioning shoe it's quite chunky, the adidas Supernova Glide 3 gives runners that absolutely cushy heel and secure upper feel making it a widely loved running and training shoe for those with a neutral gait. Even mild overpronaTPRs find great comfort and stability in the adidas Supernova Glide 3 as it has a plushed out midsole that provides enough support. Such a construction of this shoe that weighs about 349 grams, makes it a highly recommended one for runners with mid to high arches and for those who are looking for the mild extra support.Specially designed for the runner demanding excessive cushioning and stability, the Adidas Supernova Glide 3 is an innovative creation of an all-round shoe. A neutral trainer packed with a cushioning punch, this shoe features the AdiPRENE technology in its heel and forefoot region, providing ample cushioning both, during heelstrike and toe-off. Its rigid build encourages heel to toe transition, making it a great hit among runners with high arches. As a bonanza, the thee stripe midfoot overlay wrap and beefy midsole on the inside of the shoe add that extra support for mild overpronaTPRs.Safe heelsWhile there are several neutral trainers available in the market, what sets the Adidas Supernova Glide 3 apart is that it doesn't compromise on technological features and details. Incorporating every bit of comfort that a shoe can offer you, the Adidas Supernova Glide 3 has an anti-microbial sockliner that ensures your feet are well protected from sweat and infections even during heavy workouts and long runs. Engineered with Geofit technology in the heel and collar regions for enhanced comfort and protection from impact, the Adidas Supernova Glide 3 has a soft, non-piling lining. The heel collar cup wraps around the heel for a snug and secure Fit, providing a great starting point for every stride. Such snug fit and comfort lining adapt to every stride of your foot, creating a customized feel.Splay your toesThe meshed upper provides ample ventilation for the feet, while the three strips of reinforced synthetic leather overlays enhance midfoot support, besides representing Adidas' belief of perseverance and strength. The toe box provides ample room for your toes to spread apart comfortably when running, preventing them from brushing against the inner walls of the shoe and getting blistered. The Adidas Supernova Glide 3 also features microsuede inserts on the upper that are seamlessly stitched, providing additional structure. The lace-up system comes as an advantage adding to the snug, comfort fit and locking the foot in place.The outsole is features a FORMOTION heel unit ensuring cushioning at its best and offering absolute comfort and tractional stability for a controlled running experience even during long runs. Created of durable rubber with AdiWEAR technology, the outsole is sure to stay your friend for years on and, even with regular use. So jet set, get yourself an Adidas Supernova Glide 3 and sync your training goals with the absolute in cushioning, stability and style. Pair this with miCoach compatibles and track your performance, while you enjoy those long, healthy runs in these comfy, durable trainers.UpperWhite mesh uppers provide maximum ventilation Synthetic black lace-ups for better fit Iconic three stripes symbolising elegance and durability in silver on the sides Padded collar and tongue, soft fabric shoe lining and cushioned insole provide all day comfort Dual-layer adiLITE/respoEVA sockliner promotes great step-in comfort and offers anti-microbial properties GEOFIT construction enhances comfortMidsoleFORMOTION midsole helps to stabilize the foot and provides exceptional ground adaptability Shock-absorbing lightweight Phylon midsole for added comfortOutsoleRubber toe box and heel counter for added protection Durable outsole with horizontal pattern provides high traction adiPRENE+ delivers supreme forefoot cushioning adiPRENE offers under heel impact protection TPRSION system helps to retain mid foot integrity adiWEAR outsole supplies optimal durability in high-wear areasWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
